Tests {0, 1, 2, 3 = 3+} - Category 3 {86703, 87389} 0-3 or Missing
 HIVTSTNG_CAT4 HIV/AIDS Screening Tests {0, 1, 2, 3 = 3+} - Category 4 {86689, G0432, G0433, G0435} 0-3 or Missing
 LEUKLYMP_COMBINED Leukemias and Lymphomas - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 LEUKLYMP_MEDICAID Leukemias and Lymphomas - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not
